description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a metallic exterior, featuring a large illuminated display panel on the front. The front panel includes a vertical window with stylized Japanese characters and an image of a bowl, suggesting it dispenses food items, possibly noodles or soup. Below the display, there is a product retrieval slot and a payment interface with a coin slot, bill acceptor, and control buttons. The right side of the machine shows some visible rust and wear, indicating outdoor or long-term use. The sides and back are plain, smooth, and metallic gray, with no visible openings or features. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability for urban environments.
description: A tall, metallic vending machine with a large illuminated display, payment interface, and product retrieval slot on the front. The sides and back are plain and gray, with visible wear on the lower front edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated display panel with Japanese characters, payment interface, product retrieval slot, and some rust on the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain metallic surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain and smooth metallic surface with no visible panels or markings.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain metallic surface similar to the left, with no visible features.
attribute_display_panel: Large vertical illuminated panel on the front, rectangular in shape, displaying Japanese characters and a bowl image.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin slot and bill acceptor located on the right side of the front panel, with visible slots and a small control area.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A small set of individual buttons located near the payment interface, arranged vertically.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: Rectangular slot below the display panel, with a flap for retrieving dispensed products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Japanese characters and a bowl image on the illuminated display panel, located centrally on the front.
